meaning: adj.装有百叶窗板的,像百叶窗板一般安排的
examples: The interior's standout feature is its undulating louvered ceiling, which "melts" at certain points like a gloopy cake topping.
A louvered surface dispersed along projected balconies covers the exterior walkways of the dormitory rooms facing the rice fields.
Experiments proved that the heat transfer efficiency of the louvered fin with nm hydrophilic film is 100% higher than the conventional straight fin.
Old louvered shutters with peeling paint can shake things up for the better, too.
Those in the know grab the spacious Eugenia Suites on the second floor, whose louvered windows overlook the palm-lined pool in the courtyard.
